languages.original_text: "Ambitions supported by will often cross the limit of what is possible. I would be interested to witness the moment when you realise yours."

languages.text: "Амбиции, подкрепленные волей часто преодолевают грань возможного. Мне было бы интересно узреть тот момент, когда вы их воплотите".
"Ambitions supported by will often cross the limit of what is possible. I would be interested to witness the moment when you realise yours."
languages.original_text: "Амбиции, подкрепленные волей часто преодолевают грань возможного. Мне было бы интересно узреть тот момент, когда вы их воплотите".

"Ambitions supported by will often cross the limit of what is possible. I would be interested to witness the moment when you realise yours."
"Ambitions supported by will often cross the limit of what is possible. I would be interested to witness the moment when you realise yours."

languages.text: «Las ambiciones apoyadas en una voluntad fuerte pueden superar el límite de lo posible. Me gustaría presenciar el momento en el que las cumpla».
languages.original_text: "Ambitions supported by will often cross the limit of what is possible. I would be interested to witness the moment when you realise yours."

traits.locale_text: «Las ambiciones apoyadas en una voluntad fuerte pueden superar el límite de lo posible. Me gustaría presenciar el momento en el que las cumpla».

languages.text: “当野心被意志支撑时，往往会越过可能性的边界。我很想亲眼见证您实现这一命运的那一刻。”
languages.original_text: "Ambitions supported by will often cross the limit of what is possible. I would be interested to witness the moment when you realise yours."

traits.locale_text: “当野心被意志支撑时，往往会越过可能性的边界。我很想亲眼见证您实现这一命运的那一刻。”

languages.text: « Il suffit bien souvent d'avoir la volonté de ses ambitions pour repousser les limites du possible. J'aimerais beaucoup voir de mes yeux le moment où vous réaliserez la vôtre. »
languages.original_text: "Ambitions supported by will often cross the limit of what is possible. I would be interested to witness the moment when you realise yours."

traits.locale_text: « Il suffit bien souvent d'avoir la volonté de ses ambitions pour repousser les limites du possible. J'aimerais beaucoup voir de mes yeux le moment où vous réaliserez la vôtre. »

languages.text: "Vom Willen gestützte Ambitionen sprengen oft die Grenzen des Möglichen. Ich wäre gerne dabei, wenn Ihr die Euren erkennt."
languages.original_text: "Ambitions supported by will often cross the limit of what is possible. I would be interested to witness the moment when you realise yours."

traits.locale_text: "Vom Willen gestützte Ambitionen sprengen oft die Grenzen des Möglichen. Ich wäre gerne dabei, wenn Ihr die Euren erkennt."

languages.text: 「意志に支えられた野心は、しばしば可能性の限界を超える。私は、あなたが自分の野望を実現する瞬間を目撃することに興味がある。」
languages.original_text: "Ambitions supported by will often cross the limit of what is possible. I would be interested to witness the moment when you realise yours."

traits.locale_text: 「意志に支えられた野心は、しばしば可能性の限界を超える。私は、あなたが自分の野望を実現する瞬間を目撃することに興味がある。」

languages.text: "İradeyle desteklenen hırslar, çoğu zaman mümkün olanın sınırını aşar. Sizinkini gerçekleştirdiğiniz anı görmeyi çok isterim."
